user_prompt: Consecrate the cortex implant before diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the cortex implant with reverence, intoning the preliminary Litany of Consecration.
Anoint the neural lattices of the cortex implant with sacred unguents, purifying its essence before diagnostics.
Invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within the cortex implant to awaken for the diagnostic rites.
Chant the Binaric Canticle of Clarity whilst initiating auspex probes upon the cortex implant.
Beseech the Omnissiah to grant unerring precision in these diagnostics of the cortex implant.

user_prompt: The Basilisk artillery awaits a calibration
prayer:
Present thyself before the Basilisk artillery, beseeching the Omnissiah's calibration upon its holy mechanisms.
Anoint the elevation servos and recoil dampeners of the Basilisk artillery with blessed oils.
Invoke the wrathful Machine Spirit of the Basilisk artillery to align for calibration.
Recite the Canticle of True Bearing as adjustment cogitators engage in calibration sequences.
Verify the Basilisk artillery's calibrations through sacred targeting auspex, praising the Machine God.

Gather the sacred mechadendrites to ready the maglock for consecration.
Encircles the maglock's electromagnetic coils with incense of purest binary code.
Intone the Rite of Binding upon the maglock, invoking its Machine Spirit to eternal vigilance.
Anoint the maglock's power relays with oils of the Omnissiah during consecration.
Seal the consecration of the maglock with the Sigil of Mars, thrice invoked.

user_prompt: The transit mag-rail awaits an emergency procedure
prayer:
Hasten to the transit mag-rail in exigency, chanting the Emergency Doxology.
Purge flux impurities from the transit mag-rail's levitation fields with sanctified abrasives.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the transit mag-rail to endure the emergency procedure.
Realign the mag-rail conduits whilst reciting binaric emergency protocols.
Conclude the emergency procedure upon the transit mag-rail with auspex benediction.

user_prompt: I need to a cycling the grav chute
prayer:
Commence the cycling of the grav chute with the Invocation of Gravitic Harmony.
Anoint the grav chute's stabilizer vanes, coaxing its Machine Spirit to cyclic obedience.
Cycle the power flux through the grav chute's emitters, intoning the Litany of Descent.
Monitor the grav chute's inertial dampeners during cycling, praising the Omnissiah.
Finalize the grav chute cycling with a test deployment under sacred vigilance.

user_prompt: I need to a sterilization the energy core
prayer:
Prepare the energy core for sterilization by encircling it with purity wards.
Irradiate the energy core's plasma chambers with sanctified lumen beams for sterilization.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the energy core to purge all contaminants in sterilization.
Chant the Purge Canticle whilst flooding the energy core with ablative nano-scrubbers.
Seal the sterilized energy core with the Omnissiah's invocation of enduring potency.

user_prompt: Can you guide meltagun a consecration?
prayer:
Approach the meltagun with mechadendrites outstretched for consecration.
Anoint the meltagun's melta coils and focusing arrays with sacred promethium oils.
Intone the Consecration of Fusion upon the meltagun, awakening its voracious Machine Spirit.
Recite binaric litanies as the meltagun's power cells are sanctified in consecration.
Test the meltagun's consecrated fury with a micro-burst, glorifying the Machine God.

Kneel before the Whirlwind, beseeching purification of its pod launchers.
Purge the Whirlwind's missile bays with incense and ablative rites for purification.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Whirlwind to cast out daemon-taint in purification.
Anoint guidance vanes of the Whirlwind whilst chanting the Canticle of Storm Cleansing.
Affirm the Whirlwind's purification through explosive test volleys under Omnissiah's gaze.

Initiate the startup of the teleportarium with the Grand Invocation of Warp Translation.
Align the teleportarium's void shield generators and pattern buffers for startup.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the teleportarium to ignite for startup rites.
Chant binaric boot sequences as the teleportarium's gyromantic arrays power up.
Verify the teleportarium startup with a micro-jump calibration, hailing the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Ready the cortex implant for sterilization
prayer:
Encircles the cortex implant with wards of purity for sterilization.
Flood the cortex implant's synaptic vaults with nano-scrubbers in sterilization rite.
Intone the Sterilization Doxology to the Machine Spirit of the cortex implant.
Anoint residual pathways of the cortex implant post-sterilization with neural balms.
Seal the cortex implant's sterilization with thrice-repeated Omnissiah benedictions.
